source_pr.title: planner: add more test cases for non-prep plan cache
source_pr.body:

### What problem does this PR solve?
<!--

There MUST be one line starting with "Issue Number:  " and

-->

Issue Number: ref #36598

Problem Summary: planner: add more test cases for non-prep plan cache

### What is changed and how it works?

planner: add more test cases for non-prep plan cache

### Check List

- [ ] Integration test
- [ ] Manual test (add detailed scripts or steps below)

Side effects

- [ ] Performance regression: Consumes more CPU
- [ ] Performance regression: Consumes more Memory

Documentation

- [ ] Contains experimental features
- [ ] Changes MySQL compatibility

### Release note

symptoms: "select * from test.t1 order by a", // order by (planner/core/plan_cacheable_checker_test.go)
failure_signature: "select * from test.t1 order by a", // order by (planner/core/plan_cacheable_checker_test.go)
root_cause_explanation: The test was flaky because it asserted an exact plan/EXPLAIN output that can vary between runs. Exact plan/EXPLAIN assertions are brittle when optimizer choices can vary. This PR stabilizes it by: "select * from test.t1 order by a", // order by (planner/core/plan_cacheable_checker_test.go).
